name: idris-observes
prompt: Medium close-up from RIGHT side. Dark-haired man in mandarin collar suit, sharp features. Watchful dark eyes, composure held. Behind him: warm amber room. Slight tension in jaw, cataloguing something unseen. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: his-deflection
prompt: Medium shot. Dark-haired man standing near table, meeting her gaze. Shoulders set, controlled posture. Warm amber room behind him. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Idris
dialogue.text: I know what it says. The words don't need reading.

name: anchoring-gesture
prompt: Extreme close-up on woman's elegant fingers pressed flat against dark table surface. The physical cost of not breaking. Warm amber light on skin. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: sera-challenges
prompt: Medium shot from LEFT. Brunette woman at table, chin lifted slightly, eyes sharp. Controlled precision in her posture. Behind her: warm room, window glow. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: Then what are you waiting for? Permission? An exception?
